name: Ethylene Yield Percentage
description: Proportion of ethylene produced relative to feedstock input, indicating conversion efficiency.
objective: Maximize conversion while minimizing losses and off-spec product.
input_measure: Ethylene produced (tons) and feedstock volume (tons) for the period.
reporting_source: Process historian and production execution logs.

name: Propylene to Ethylene (P/E) Ratio
description: Ratio of propylene production to ethylene production used to assess product slate balance.
objective: Align product mix with market demand and margin objectives.
reporting_source: Process historian (e.g., AVEVA PI System) and control system archives.

name: Daily Feedstock Throughput (tons/day)
description: Average processing rate of feedstock normalized to a per-day basis.
objective: Maximize utilization within equipment, energy, and safety constraints.
input_measure: Total feedstock processed (tons) and hours online in the period.

name: Polymer Melt Flow Index (MFI) Variance
description: Variance of MFI results across polymer samples, indicating consistency of flow characteristics.
objective: Maintain product quality and process stability by minimizing variability.
input_measure: MFI test results from production or lab samples.
reporting_source: Laboratory information system (LIMS) and QA records.

name: Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE)
description: Composite KPI of Availability, Performance, and Quality expressed as a percentage.
objective: Increase effective productive time by reducing downtime, speed losses, and quality losses.
input_measure: Availability, performance, and quality factors for the asset or line.
reporting_source: MES/production systems and equipment runtime counters.

name: Energy Intensity Index (EII)
description: Index comparing actual energy consumption to a reference baseline for similar units.
objective: Improve energy efficiency and reduce operating costs while meeting production targets.
input_measure: Total energy consumed by unit, production volume, and reference baseline.
reporting_source: Energy meters, historian, and energy accounting systems.

name: Specific Steam Consumption (ton/ton)
description: Steam usage normalized by product mass.
objective: Optimize steam distribution and reduce utility costs without affecting quality.
input_measure: Total steam used (tons) and product produced (tons).

name: Cooling Water Delta-T (°C)
description: Temperature rise across cooling water circuits, indicating heat removal performance.
objective: Maintain proper heat exchange to protect equipment and ensure product quality.
input_measure: Cooling water outlet and inlet temperatures.

name: Mean Time Between Failures (MTBF)
description: Average operating time between equipment failures.
objective: Improve reliability and reduce unplanned downtime.
input_measure: Operating hours and number of failures for the asset.

name: Pump Vibration Anomaly Rate
description: Frequency of vibration anomalies above control limits across monitored pumps.
objective: Detect early signs of mechanical degradation to prevent failures.
input_measure: Count of vibration events and monitoring intervals per pump.

name: SOx Emissions Concentration (kg/m³)
description: Measured concentration of sulfur oxides in flue gas.
objective: Ensure environmental compliance and minimize emissions.
input_measure: SOx concentration readings from CEMS or stack analyzers.

name: Flare Gas Recovery Rate
description: Percentage of total gas recovered instead of flared.
objective: Reduce flaring and emissions through effective recovery operations.
input_measure: Gas flared (m³) and gas recovered (m³) over the period.
reporting_source: Flare meters and recovery system flow meters via historian.

name: On‑Spec Production Percentage
description: Share of total production that meets all specification limits.
objective: Increase first-pass quality and reduce rework or scrap.
input_measure: Counts of on-spec batches and total batches.

name: Specific Catalyst Cost ($/ton)
description: Catalyst cost normalized by product mass.
objective: Control catalyst spend while maintaining performance.
input_measure: Catalyst cost and product quantity for the period.
reporting_source: ERP/finance system and production totals from historian or MES.

name: Maintenance to Operating Cost Ratio
description: Share of maintenance cost relative to total operating cost.
objective: Balance maintenance investment against reliability and throughput.
input_measure: Maintenance costs and total operating costs for the period.
